phrases.intent_en: Ask what is showing this season
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qui est programmé cette saison à l'opéra ?
phrases.pronunciation: kes-kee eh proh-grah-MAY set say-ZOHN ah loh-pay-RAH
phrases.cultural_note: The Opéra de Lyon is one of France's most respected opera houses, known for adventurous programming and its ballet company. The season runs from September to June.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the dress code for the evening
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une tenue vestimentaire recommandée pour ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon tuh-NOO ves-tee-mahn-TAIR ruh-koh-mahn-DAY poor suh SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: Smart dress is traditional at the opera but rarely enforced. Evening performances tend to attract a more formally dressed crowd than matinees.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to collect reserved tickets
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je retirer les billets que j'ai réservés ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo pwee-zhuh ruh-tee-RAY lay bee-YEH kuh zhay ray-ZAIR-vay
phrases.cultural_note: The box office (billetterie) is on the ground floor near the main entrance. Arrive at least 30 minutes before the performance to collect tickets and find your seat.

responses.english: At the box office, with your reference.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are student tickets available
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des places à tarif étudiant ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day PLAHS ah tah-REEF ay-too-DYAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Opéra de Lyon offers reduced-price tickets for students and young people.

phrases.intent_en: Order a drink at the interval
phrases.text_local: Un verre de champagne, s'il vous plaît, pour l'entracte.
phrases.pronunciation: uhn VAIR duh shahm-PAN-yuh, seel voo PLEH, poor lahn-TRAKT
phrases.cultural_note: Pre-ordering interval drinks is common at French opera houses. Ask the bar staff to prepare your order so it is ready when the curtain falls for the entracte (interval).

responses.english: A glass of white wine, please.
responses.phonetic: uhn VEHR duh VEHN BLAHN, seel voo PLEH
responses.local: Un verre de vin blanc, s'il vous plaît.
